afghan-pasta.name: Afghan Pasta

ingredients.item: . diamond crystal or 1 0.5 tsp. morton kosher salt

instructions: Stir 2 garlic cloves, finely grated, 1 cup plain whole-milk yogurt, 3 Tbsp. finely chopped mint, 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt, and 1 Tbsp. water in a medium bowl to combine. Chill yogurt sauce while you make the meat sauce.

Heat 1 Tbsp. extra-virgin olive oil in a large Dutch oven or other heavy pot over medium. Break 1 lb. ground beef into large (about 3") clumps and add to pot; season with 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, undisturbed, until meat is browned underneath and some fat has cooked out, 6–8 minutes.

Break up meat with a wooden spoon, then add 2 large onions, finely chopped, and remaining 6 garlic cloves, finely chopped. Stir in 1½ tsp. ground coriander, 1½ tsp. ground cumin, ¾ tsp. cayenne pepper, and remaining 1 tsp. Diamond Crystal or ½ tsp. Morton kosher salt. Cook, stirring occasionally, until onions are softened, 6–8 minutes. Add 3 Tbsp. double-concentrated tomato paste and cook, stirring, until tomato paste is darkened in color, about 2 minutes.

Pour in one 28-oz. can crushed tomatoes and 2 cups water and stir to combine. Bring to a simmer, then reduce heat to medium-low and cook, stirring occasionally, until sauce is thickened and flavors have come together, 30–35 minutes.

About 10 minutes before sauce is done, cook 16 oz. pappardelle, rigatoni, or penne in a large pot of boiling salted water, stirring occasionally, until very al dente, about 2 minutes less than package directions. Using tongs, transfer pasta to pot with sauce. Add 1 cup pasta cooking liquid and cook over medium heat, tossing constantly, until pasta is al dente and sauce is slightly thickened, about 2 minutes.
Divide pasta among bowls. Drizzle yogurt sauce over and top with mint leaves.

air-fried-falafel.name: Air Fried Falafel
instructions: Dry chickpeas on paper towels. Place onions and garlic in the bowl of a food processor fitted with a steel blade. Add parsley, scallions, cilantro, cumin, salt, and red pepper flakes. Process until blended, 30 to 60 seconds, then add the chickpeas and pulse 2 to 3 times until just blended, but not pureed. Sprinkle in flour and baking powder, scrape the sides of the bowl down with a spatula, and pulse 2 to 3 times.
Transfer to a bowl and refrigerate, covered, 2 to 3 hours.
Form the falafel mixture into 12 balls; if mixture is too sticky add some flour to your hands and your work surface.
Preheat an air fryer to 177°C (175 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions. Spray falafel with cooking spray.
Cook in the preheated air fryer until golden brown, about 14 minutes, turning halfway through.

air-fryer-bacon.name: Air-fryer Bacon

ingredients.item: Regular (4 ounces; 113g) or thick-cut (6 ounces; 170g) bacon

instructions: {'step': '1', 'instruction': 'Set air fryer to 175°C and preheat for 10 minutes.'}
{'step': '2', 'instruction': 'Place bacon in the basket, trying not to overlap (it’s okay if the bacon comes up the sides of the basket slightly).'}
{'step': '3', 'instruction': 'Cook, using tongs to flip halfway through, for 8 to 10 minutes for tender-crisp and 10 to 12 minutes for shattering-crisp bacon.'}
{'step': '4', 'instruction': 'Transfer the bacon onto a plate lined with paper towels and allow it to drain.'}
{'step': '5', 'instruction': 'Serve.'}

air-fryer-bacon-wrapped-chicken-thighs.name: Air Fryer Bacon-wrapped Chicken Thighs
instructions: Combine softened butter, 1/2 clove minced garlic, thyme, basil, salt, and pepper in a bowl. Place butter on a piece of wax paper and roll up rightly to form a butter log. Refrigerate until firm, about 2 hours.

Lay a bacon strip flat on a piece of wax paper. Place a chicken thigh on top of bacon and sprinkle with some of remaining minced garlic. Open up chicken thigh. Place 1 to 2 teaspoons of cold butter mixture in the middle of chicken thigh. Tuck one end of bacon into the middle of chicken thigh. Fold over chicken thigh and roll bacon around thigh. Repeat with remaining thighs and bacon.
Preheat an air fryer to 188°C (190 degrees C).

Place chicken thighs in the basket of the air fryer and cook until chicken is no longer pink and the juices run clear, about 25 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted in the center of thighs should read 74°C (74 degrees C).

air-fryer-dry-rubbed-pork-tenderloin-wit.name: Air Fryer Dry-rubbed Pork Tenderloin With Broccoli

ingredients.item: Salt and ground black pepper to taste

instructions: Combine brown sugar, paprika, ground mustard, 1 teaspoon salt, ½ teaspoon black pepper, garlic powder, and cayenne pepper in a small bowl until well blended.
Brush pork tenderloin with 1 tablespoon olive oil to coat; rub spice mixture on all sides of tenderloin and let sit for 5 minutes.
Preheat an air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C) according to manufacturer's instructions.
Carefully place tenderloin in air fryer basket; cook in the preheated air fryer for 20 minutes.
Meanwhile, place broccoli in a microwave-safe bowl. Microwave on high until tender, about 3 minutes. Stir in 1 tablespoon olive oil; season with salt and black pepper.
Transfer tenderloin to a cutting board; rest before slicing, 10 minutes.
Meanwhile, place broccoli in air fryer basket. Cook in the air fryer 10 minutes, shaking basket halfway through.

air-fryer-lemon-freezer-cookies.name: Air Fryer Lemon Freezer Cookies
instructions: Cream butter, sugar, and pudding mix together in a bowl. Beat in egg, lemon juice, and 1/2 of the lemon zest. Set aside remaining lemon zest for icing.
Sift flour, baking powder, and salt together in another bowl. Add to butter-pudding mixture and beat until well combined.
Roll dough into 2 logs, wrap in plastic wrap, and freeze until firm, about 4 hours.
Preheat an air fryer to 163°C (165 degrees C). Line the air fryer basket with parchment paper.
Slice frozen dough into 1/4-inch slices and place in the prepared basket.

Air fry cookies, working in batches, until edges start to brown, 6 to 10 minutes. Remove from the air fryer and leave in the basket until cool to the touch, then place on a wire rack to cool completely.
While cookies are baking, combine powdered sugar, lemon juice, and reserved lemon zest in a bowl. Dip 1 side of each cookie in icing. Let icing set until hardened, about 2 minutes.

air-fryer-roasted-cherry-tomatoes.name: Air Fryer Roasted Cherry Tomatoes
instructions: Preheat air fryer to 204°C (200 degrees C).
Cut a piece of parchment paper to fit slightly larger than your air fryer basket.
Toss together tomatoes, olive oil, Italian seasoning, salt, pepper and garlic powder in a bowl.
Place parchment paper into the air fryer basket, then add tomatoes. Roast for 10 minutes.
Remove tomatoes to a bowl using a spatula. Carefully lift parchment paper out of air fryer and top tomatoes with any remaining juices.

alentejo-boleima-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo Boleima
instructions: Put the flour, sugar, and lemon shaving in a bowl. Open a cavity in the center and put the yeast in it, previously dissolved in the milk. Add the eggs, knead everything very well, until you get a homogeneous mass, then cover and let it leave till it gets twice the volume.
Peel the apples, peel them, cut them into blades and reserve. After leavening, knead the dough again, divide it into 4 equal pieces and stretch them in rectangular shape.
On a tray, greased with olive oil, have the layers of dough interspersed with the apple blades, dusting each layer with a mixture of sugar and cinnamon.

Brush the last layer (which should be mass) with the yolk, previously mixed with milk, and sprinkle with more sugar and cinnamon. Take it to the oven, preheated at 180°C, for about 45 minutes or until it gets golden. Remove from the oven and serve cut into squares.

alentejo-style-pork-rojoes-teleculinaria.name: Alentejo-style Pork Rojões
instructions: Get the pork, cut it in cubes and dispose of it in a clay pot. Add the garlic pasta and pepper paste, season with the blond leaf, sweet pepper, white wine, salt and spicy. Cover to let marinate overnight in the fridge.
Light a pot with the lard, add the meat and sausage to the slices and let it fry. If necessary, gather slowly, the marinade not to let burn.
Retire do lume, polvilhe com salsa picada e sirva a acompanhar com batata frita.

almond-cherry-chocolate-bark.name: Almond-cherry Chocolate Bark
instructions: Heat oven to 177°C. On a baking sheet lined with parchment paper, toast 3/4 cup whole skin-on almonds until fragrant and light gold, 8 to 10 minutes. Let cool completely; transfer to a bowl. Fill a medium saucepan with 1 inch water; bring to a simmer over medium-low heat. Set a large heatproof bowl atop saucepan, making sure water doesn't touch bottom of bowl. Place 10 ounces dark chocolate (60 percent to 70 percent cocoa) in bowl; cook, stirring, until smooth. Remove bowl from saucepan; add another 2 ounces dark chocolate and stir until smooth. Stir in 1/2 teaspoon pure vanilla extract, toasted almonds and 1/3 cup dried tart cherries, coarsely chopped. Pour onto baking sheet; spread into an even layer about 1/4 inch thick. Refrigerate until firm, 1 hour. Break into 24 pieces.

almost-aam-panna.name: Almost Aam Panna
instructions: Blend applesauce, mint leaves, brown sugar, lime juice, chaat masala, cardamom, cumin, salt, saffron threads, and 1½ cups cold water in a blender until smooth. Strain through a fine-mesh sieve into a small pitcher.
Divide drink among ice-filled glasses and garnish each with a mint sprig and lime wedge.

alt-grain-porridge-with-kimchi-and-jammy.name: Alt-grain Porridge With Kimchi And Jammy Eggs
instructions: Pulse spelt in a blender or food processor until coarsely chopped (all of the grains should be broken open but not ground to a powder). Combine spelt and 4 cups water in a large saucepan over medium-high; season with salt and pepper. Bring to a boil, reduce heat, and simmer, whisking occasionally, until spelt is tender and mixture is thick, 25–35 minutes. Whisk in Parmesan and butter. Add water by tablespoonfuls if needed to loosen.
Just before porridge is done, cook eggs in a small saucepan of boiling water 6 minutes. Transfer to a bowl of ice water and let sit just until warm. Carefully peel and slice in half lengthwise.
Heat oil in a small skillet over medium. Cook kimchi, tossing, just until slightly darkened and warmed through, about 1 minute.
Divide grain porridge among bowls. Divide kimchi and eggs over top.

amoroso-relleno-a-croissant-ring-filled-.name: Amoroso Relleno: A Croissant Ring Filled With Chicken That Every Puerto Rican Would Fall In Love With
amoroso-relleno-a-croissant-ring-filled-.original_name: Amoroso Relleno: Un anillo de croissant relleno de pollo del que toda boricua se enamoraría

ingredients.item: 1 libra de muslos de pollo deshuesados y sin piel.
1 taza de caldo de pollo o agua.
1 teaspoon of adobo and date each.
Grated cheeses (as much as you wish. I used 1.5 cups.)
Optional: To add sweet bananas in cubes that are cold in 2 tablespoons of butter.

instructions: Swallow your boned chicken thighs with salt and pepper to taste, sodrit, ground oregan and adobo and date. If you can, let him put his face out all night.
Add olive oil to the frying pan and cook both sides for about 4 to 7 minutes, depending on the size of the thighs. Likewise, chicken doesn't have to be completely cooked yet.
Transfiere los muslos de pollo a una olla, agrega el caldo de pollo y deja hervir a fuego lento durante unos 10 minutos a temperatura media.
While the chicken boils with low heat, cuts the bananas into small pieces (I cut each slice into four quarters). Add olive oil to frying pan, add bananas and sauona with salt.

Around this time, chicken thighs should be ready to add tomato dough to the pot. Let them simmer for about 10 more minutes, or till you have finished separating your Pillsbury Crescent Rolls. Put some scroll paper and then put a circular object, as a cup, at the centre. place the dough for each roll next to each other, slightly put onto each other on a large cook plate. Preheat your oven at 375 degrees.
Once the pieces of banana are golden and the chicken is well cooked, transfer it to a bowl to crumble the chicken (whether with a hand mixer or two forks) and then add the pieces of banana.
Add the chicken and banana mixture to the croissant mass circle in a circular movement, pitted onto the mass side that's closer to the cup or circular centre.
As you'll see from the video, then you'll have to take the long ends and double them onto the pilling.
Complete the circle, beat the eggs and brush the top of the dough to get that golden once baked.
Remove the mug from the centre and place the ring at the central grid and let cook from 10 to 14 minutes or until the dough's golden.

and-delicious-ginger-infusion-step-by-st.name: And Delicious Ginger Infusion, step by step
and-delicious-ginger-infusion-step-by-st.original_name: Fácil y deliciosa infusión de jengibre, paso a paso
instructions: Let's start this recipe, place the water in a pot and put the fire.
When breaking up a hervor, add ginger and let cook for about 20 minutes to cover all its flavour and properties.
After that time, put out and leave to stand for about 10 minutes so that everything will be settled.
Serve in the cup and add a tablet of Honey, mix till completely dissolved.
Now, you'll be ready to enjoy.

apple-and-bread-pudding-dessert-comedera.name: Apple And Bread Pudding, Dessert
apple-and-bread-pudding-dessert-comedera.original_name: Apple and bread pudding, postre clásico

ingredients.item: 500 g of bread (may also be 6 croissants)

instructions: Let's start our recipe, cut the apples into sheets. Once we have them ready, we'll warm up a frying pan with butter.
When the butter's melted, add the apples and you'll scattering them for 5 minutes without them untiring. Turn and put them out.
A light and well-coloured caramel with the 100 g of sugar. When I'm ready, you're gonna put them into a bread mold.
In a bowl, you're gonna mix the cream, 6 eggs, and the sugar till they're really well integrated.
Posteriormente, vas a intercalar en el molde capas de manzana con el pan que deb estar troceado.
Once you have the layers, you're gonna put the cream, egg and sugar mixture to cover.
Mairy bath for 40 minutes at 170 ° C
Once the time's up, let's cool and cool to get ready. Degusta!

apple-and-yogurt-cake-teleculinaria.name: Apple And Yogurt Cake
instructions: Put the yolks in a bowl, add the sugar and butter softened and beat with the mixer until you get a whitish cream.

Add yogurt and apples, previously peeled and grated, and wrap. Add the flour and yeast and mix very well, until it's all incorporated. On the other hand, beat the clears into castle and wrap them in the previous preparation.

Lay the dough in a form, previously greased with butter and sprinkled with flour, and put it in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 40 minutes. Remove, cool, peel and serve sprinkled with powdered sugar.

apple-cinnamon-skillet-cobbler.name: Apple Cinnamon Skillet Cobbler
instructions: Preheat your oven to 350ºF (180ºC).
In a cast-iron skillet over medium-low heat, add the apples, sugar, cornstarch, lemon juice, spices, and salt.
Mix to combine and stir for 5-10 minutes until the mixture starts to thicken.
Let simmer for 5 minutes on low heat.
Sprinkle the box cake mix over the apple filling.
Add the nuts and evenly distribute the sliced butter over the top to ensure even baking.
Bake for 45 minutes to an hour, until the top is golden brown.
Serve warm with ice cream.
Enjoy!

apple-flourless-cake-recipe-lezzet.name: Apple Flourless Cake Recipe

apple-pie-from-scratch.name: Apple Pie From Scratch
instructions: In a medium-sized bowl, add the flour and salt. Mix with fork until combined.
Add in cubed butter and break up into flour with a fork. Mixture will still have lumps about the size of small peas.

Gradually add the ice water and continue to mix until the dough starts to come together. You may not need all of the water, but if the dough is too dry then add more. The dough should not be very tacky or sticky.
Work the dough together with your hands and turn out onto a surface. Work into a ball and cover with cling wrap. Refrigerate.
Peel the apples, then core and slice.
In a bowl, add the sliced apples, sugar, flour, salt, cinnamon, nutmeg, and juice from the lemon.
Mix until combined and all apples are coated. Refrigerate.
Preheat the oven to 191°C (200°C).
On a floured surface, cut the pie dough in half and roll out both halves until round and about ⅛-inch (3 mm) thick.
Roll the dough around the rolling pin and unroll onto a pie dish making sure the dough reaches all edges. Trim extra if necessary.
Pour in apple filling mixture and pat down.
Roll the other half of the dough on top.
Trim the extra dough from the edges and pinch the edges to create a crimp. Make sure edges are sealed together.
Brush the pie with the beaten egg and sprinkle with the sugar.
Cut four slits in the top of the pie to create a vent.
Bake pie for 50-60 minutes or until the crust is golden brown and no greyish or undercooked pastry remains.
Allow to cool completely before slicing.
Top with ice cream and serve.
Enjoy!

artichoke-salad-lezzet.name: Artichoke Salad
instructions: 1. Pour the juice of half a lemon in planted water by dividing artichokes, drain water and take it in a bowl.

5. Add salt, olive oil and lemon juice and blend.

artichoke-with-lamb-meat-lezzet.name: Artichoke With Lamb Meat

arugula-salad-with-yogurt-recipe-lezzet.name: Arugula Salad With Yogurt Recipe

ingredients.item: You can get different tastes by adding spinach, marul or mixed greens.
You can increase the aroma using roka mixture with fresh mint or yeast.
sucan use yogurt–krema mixture or light yogurt instead of yogurt.
Vegan alternative to Cashmere yogurt (badem or peel yogurt) can be preferred.
You can add garlic powder or fine chopped fresh onions instead of garlic.

arugula-salsa-verde.name: Arugula Salsa Verde

ingredients.item: Finely grated zest of 1 small lemon

instructions: Mix tomatoes, if using, lemon zest, garlic, arugula, breadcrumbs, capers, and vinegar in a small bowl. Using a wooden spoon, slowly mix in ¾ cup oil, then Parmesan. Pour a little oil on surface to keep salsa from discoloring.

aunt-rosas-carrot-cheesecakes-teleculina.name: Aunt Rosa's Carrot Cheesecakes
aunt-rosas-carrot-cheesecakes-teleculina.original_name: Queijadas de cenoura da tia Rosa
instructions: Combine small individual shapes 7 cm in diameter with butter, sprinkle them with flour and reserve.
Cook the carrots, peeled and cut into pieces, in a pot with salty water, then drain them and reduce them to puree.

Light another pot with water, sugar, cinnamon stick, lemon peel and cardamom until caramelized (145°C with the kitchen thermometer). Add the carrot puree, stir well, then add the butter and keep it on the fire, always stirring until it starts to drop from the pot. Take it off and let it cool down a bit.

Slightly beat the yolks with the eggs, add to the previous preparation and bring them back to the fire without stopping stirring. When it starts boiling, remove from the fire and eliminate the cinnamon stick, lemon peel and cardamom.
Fill the forms with the previous cream, put them in the oven, preheated to 180°C, for about 25 minutes, then remove, cool and deform. Serve cold cheeses, sprinkled with powdered sugar.
Se quiser eliminar o sabor a caramelo, opte pelo ponto de fio: levante uma colher com um pouco de calda, deixe cair novamente no tacho e verifique se esta forma um fio.

avgolemono-soup.name: Avgolemono Soup
instructions: Place chicken, 1 chopped onion, celery, carrot, bay leaves, salt, and oregano in a large pot. Pour water over the top; bring to a boil, reduce heat to medium-low, and simmer, skimming foam as necessary, until chicken is falling off the bone, 60 to 90 minutes. An instant-read thermometer inserted into the thickest part of the thigh, near the bone, should read 74°C (74 degrees C).
Transfer chicken to a large bowl to cool. Strain all vegetables from simmering broth, discard vegetables, and return broth to the pot.
Chop chicken meat into bite-sized pieces and set aside.
Combine 2 cups diced onion, olive oil, and a pinch of salt in a large skillet over medium heat. Cook and stir onion mixture until onion is soft, sweet, and golden, 7 to 10 minutes.

Stir onion mixture into broth in the pot and set over medium-low heat; add Arborio rice and a pinch of salt. Bring to a simmer; cook, stirring occasionally, until rice is very tender and broth flavors combine, about 45 minutes.
Whisk together eggs, black pepper, and cayenne pepper in a medium bowl; whisk in lemon juice until combined. Slowly pour 1 cup broth mixture into egg mixture, whisking constantly.
Whisk another 1 cup broth mixture into egg mixture, then pour egg mixture into the pot. Stir well.
Add chopped chicken and cook until heated through, about 5 minutes more.
Serve hot and enjoy!

avocado-quinoa-power-salad.name: Avocado Quinoa Power Salad
instructions: In a small saucepan, bring the water and a pinch of salt to a boil. Add the quinoa, cover, and simmer for 15 minutes, or until the water is absorbed. Transfer to a medium bowl to cool to room temperature, then fluff the quinoa.
Refrigerate the quinoa for 20 minutes.
Add the spinach, cucumber, tomatoes, and avocado to the bowl of quinoa and mix to combine.
Add the lemon juice, olive oil, salt, and pepper, and mix well.
Enjoy!
